Gender Equality.reason: Explicitly focuses on "gender politics," "misogyny," and the experiences of "Rural Migrant Women," directly addressing gender equality and discrimination (Targets 5.1, 5.c).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Focuses on the "platform economy," "digital media era," and "internet, smartphones," analyzing the infrastructure and innovation driving modern industry and labor (Targets 9.b, 9.c).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Examines "rural-to-urban migration" and "return migration," key aspects of urbanization and the links between rural and urban areas (Target 11.a).
